# Workflow Status Badges

Add these badges to your README.md to show the status of your CI/CD pipelines:

## CI Pipeline
```markdown
[![CI Pipeline](https://github.com/YOUR_ORG/YOUR_REPO/actions/workflows/ci.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/YOUR_ORG/YOUR_REPO/actions/workflows/ci.yml)
```

## Deployment Pipeline
```markdown
[![Deployment](https://github.com/YOUR_ORG/YOUR_REPO/actions/workflows/deploy.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/YOUR_ORG/YOUR_REPO/actions/workflows/deploy.yml)
```

## Security Scanning
```markdown
[![Security Scan](https://github.com/YOUR_ORG/YOUR_REPO/actions/workflows/security.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/YOUR_ORG/YOUR_REPO/actions/workflows/security.yml)
```

## Performance Testing
```markdown
[![Performance Tests](https://github.com/YOUR_ORG/YOUR_REPO/actions/workflows/performance.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/YOUR_ORG/YOUR_REPO/actions/workflows/performance.yml)
```

## Combined Badge Example
```markdown
[![CI](https://github.com/YOUR_ORG/YOUR_REPO/actions/workflows/ci.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/YOUR_ORG/YOUR_REPO/actions/workflows/ci.yml)
[![Deploy](https://github.com/YOUR_ORG/YOUR_REPO/actions/workflows/deploy.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/YOUR_ORG/YOUR_REPO/actions/workflows/deploy.yml)
[![Security](https://github.com/YOUR_ORG/YOUR_REPO/actions/workflows/security.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/YOUR_ORG/YOUR_REPO/actions/workflows/security.yml)
[![Performance](https://github.com/YOUR_ORG/YOUR_REPO/actions/workflows/performance.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/YOUR_ORG/YOUR_REPO/actions/workflows/performance.yml)
```

Replace `YOUR_ORG` and `YOUR_REPO` with your actual GitHub organization and repository names.
